'''Baladdok''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] affiliate of [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla the Hutt]], who was based on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. A bounty, 2,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] [[Death/Legends|dead]], was posted on him after slaughtering a [[Ronto/Legends|ronto]] belonging to a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] village in the [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] claimed the bounty in [[Imperial Station Bravo|Gardulla's palace]].
